items.summary: Update the Navbar component to include a fullscreen overlay menu that opens when the hamburger icon is clicked on any screen size (not just mobile). The fullscreen overlay should cover the entire viewport with a dark/glassmorphism background matching the site's cinematic theme. Inside the overlay, display large navigation links: Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, and Contact — each smooth-scrolling to the respective section. Include an animated close button (X) to dismiss the overlay. The open/close transition should use smooth animated entrance/exit effects (e.g. fade-in + slide or scale). The existing desktop navigation links in the navbar should remain visible alongside the hamburger icon trigger.
